name: publish-npm-clawhub
description: Guarded workflow for publishing skills/plugins to npm and ClawHub, with suspicious-scan review and local-only account config.
notes: Real publish accounts must stay in config/publish.accounts.local.json and never be committed.
Prefer preparing a temporary release directory instead of publishing the repository root.
Capability notes like Credentials/Persistence are not the same as suspicious verdicts; verify staticScan.status on the latest version.
